summaries./alerts/digest: Rolled-up alert summary across jumps / sentiment-disagree / arbs.
summaries./alerts/{id}: Get an alert rule by id
summaries./alerts/{id}/test: Dry-run dispatch to the rule's channels
summaries./alpha-hub/leaderboard: Paginated, filtered, sortable view of curated alpha strategies.
summaries./alpha-hub/live-panel: Composite payload: top production alphas + watchlist + recent graveyard.
summaries./alpha-hub/regenerate-tiers: Re-run the walk-forward harness over alpha_strategies.json
summaries./alpha-hub/regenerate-tiers/{job_id}: Fetch status / summary of a regen job
summaries./alpha-hub/strategy/{pair_id}: Full per-strategy detail (all fields from alpha_strategies.json).
summaries./alpha-hub/strategy/{pair_id}/live-signa: On-demand live signal + Kelly-scaled sizing for a single pair (bypasses the hourly batch).
summaries./archive/cross-venue/concepts: Catalog of pre-mapped cross-venue concepts (PM vs Kalshi).
summaries./archive/cross-venue/{concept}: Polymarket vs Kalshi divergence metrics for a resolved concept.
summaries./archive/kalshi/market/{ticker}: Per-market detail (metadata + history + stats), optionally as CSV.
summaries./archive/kalshi/markets: Paginated list of settled Kalshi markets.
summaries./archive/kalshi/series: Per-series stats over all settled Kalshi markets.
summaries./archive/polymarket/export-bulk: Bulk-export N archive markets as a ZIP of per-slug files.
summaries./archive/polymarket/market/{slug}: Full archive detail (history + stats) for one resolved market.
summaries./archive/polymarket/markets: Paginated list of resolved Polymarket markets in a date range.
summaries./archive/polymarket/search: Substring search over resolved-market slug + question.
summaries./archive/polymarket/themes: Aggregate stats per theme across the most recent resolved markets.
summaries./auth/demo-key: Mint a 24h Free-tier demo key (open, no admin token required)
summaries./auth/first-boot-info: One-shot retrieval of the autogenerated admin token (prod only)
summaries./auth/keys: Create a new API key (admin only)
summaries./auth/keys/me: Inspect the API key in use on this request
summaries./auth/keys/me/usage: Usage stats for the API key in use
summaries./divergence/smart-money: Top PM-vs-equity flow divergences across the universe.
summaries./divergence/{slug}: Divergence snapshot for a single (slug, default-ticker) pair.
summaries./embed/compare: Embeddable overlay of 2+ market price histories (normalised).
summaries./embed/market/{slug}: Embeddable mini-card for a Polymarket market.
summaries./embed/og/factor/{factor_id}: Open-Graph PNG (1200x630) for a factor share link.
summaries./embed/og/market/{slug}.png: Open-Graph PNG (1200x630) for a market — used in social unfurls.
summaries./embed/og/strategy/{strategy_id}: Open-Graph PNG (1200x630) for a strategy share link.
summaries./embed/strategy/{pair_id}: Embeddable card for a validated alpha strategy.
summaries./factors/themes/{theme}/leaderboard: Top-N factors in a theme by trailing 7-day volatility.
summaries./factors/{slug}/related: Top-10 factors most correlated with the given anchor.
summaries./health/deep: Parallel upstream-readiness probe (Polymarket, Kalshi, yfinance, Redis, GDELT)
summaries./hedge/auto-config: Solve PM hedge sizes that neutralise a portfolio's factor β.
summaries./hedge/simulate: Paper-trade a daily-rebalance hedge over N days.
summaries./indices/pm-vix/refresh-slugs: Validate hardcoded bucket slugs against Polymarket and persist replacements.
summaries./indices/pm-vix/slugs: Return the current per-bucket slug map (live or fallback).
summaries./lab/discover: Kick off an alpha-discovery run (background task)
summaries./lab/promote/{candidate_id}: Mark a candidate for human review (does NOT auto-promote)
summaries./lab/queue: Get the lab's current runtime state
summaries./lab/results/{job_id}: Fetch results for a specific job
summaries./macro/calendar/export.ics: iCalendar export of the macro calendar (Google Calendar friendly).
summaries./ml/calibration: Calibration & favourite–longshot bias of resolved-market prices.
summaries./ml/event-graph: VAR-powered event relationship graph (co-movement + directed lead-lag).
summaries./ml/factor-importance: Non-linear factor-importance diagnostic for a target equity (HistGBR + perm. importance).
summaries./ml/factor-map: 2-D embedding of the prediction-market factor universe (Factor Galaxy).
summaries./ml/factor-neighbors: Top co-movers (de-dup candidates) and opposites (hedges) for a factor.
summaries./ml/latent-factors: PCA latent-factor decomposition of the prediction-market universe.
summaries./ml/meta-label: Triple-barrier meta-labeling: a take/skip filter over a z-score reversion signal.
summaries./ml/mispricing: Relative-value residual scan: factors abnormally rich/cheap vs their peers.
summaries./ml/regime: Classify recent market state into discrete regimes (Regime Monitor).
summaries./multi-event/lasso: Fit LassoCV across N PM-factor Δlogits to predict ticker log returns.
summaries./multi-event/macro-correlation: Δlogit(factor) vs Δ(macro) correlation, t-stat, and lead-lag.
summaries./multi-event/sector-attribution: Per-sector OLS-HAC and variance attribution across PM factors.
summaries./multi-event/systemic-factor: Extract a PM-PCA systemic risk-on/off factor from N PM factors.
summaries./news/causal-chain: Build news -> Δprob -> Δlogit -> ticker-impact chain for a factor.
summaries./news/entity/{entity}/factors: Top factors associated with a named entity.
summaries./news/factor/{factor_id}/recent: Recently tagged news items for a factor.
summaries./news/movers: Top news items by |expected stock impact| across registered factors.
summaries./news/search: Free-form news search scored by token-Jaccard, optionally factor-tagged.
summaries./news/tag: Tag a single news headline -> entities + matched factors + sentiment.
summaries./news/tag-batch: Bulk-tag a list of news items.
summaries./portfolio/import: Import a user-supplied CSV of equity holdings.
summaries./portfolio/pnl-monte-carlo: Monte-Carlo P&L distribution from N bootstrapped Δlogit paths.
summaries./portfolio/resolution-tree: Conditional MTM tree (YES vs NO outcome) for a portfolio on a factor.
summaries./pricing/binary/{slug}: Compute model-implied fair price for a binary prediction market.
summaries./regression/elastic-net: Fit an Elastic Net regression of stock returns on factor changes
summaries./regression/methods: List available regression methods and their support status
summaries./replay/order: Simulate a paper-trade order against historical prices
summaries./replay/scenario/{scenario_name}/pnl: Realized historical basket PnL for the scenario window
summaries./replay/scenario/{scenario_name}/preflig: Verify each scenario slug is still resolvable on Polymarket
summaries./replay/state: Snapshot of PM + equity state at a past timestamp
summaries./research/citations: Cross-document bibliography of papers referenced across alpha reports, ADRs and the regression-methodology proposal.
summaries./research/reports: List all alpha-report versions as JSON cards
summaries./research/reports/{version}: Return the markdown body (or HTML) of a single alpha report
summaries./signals/connectivity-check: Probe Polymarket Gamma + CLOB end-to-end with a sample slug.
summaries./strategies/arb/blacklist: Append an arb_key to the blacklist
summaries./strategies/arb/config: Current scan threshold + mode + last-known control
summaries./strategies/arb/discovery/confirmed: Durable store of markets where an arb was seen
summaries./strategies/arb/discovery/step: Run one discovery step (crawl → match → store)
summaries./strategies/arb/new-events: Newest Kalshi and Polymarket markets (last 24h) for MM-seed scouting
summaries./strategies/arb/pending-discoveries: List HIGH-confidence discoveries awaiting manual review
summaries./strategies/arb/pending-discoveries/acce: Move a pending discovery into the live engine config
summaries./strategies/arb/pending-discoveries/reje: Drop a pending discovery and remember the rejection
summaries./strategies/arb/pnl: Simulated PnL log from arb_engine test-mode trades
summaries./strategies/arb/state: Live arb engine state — opportunities + scan log
summaries./strategies/crypto/5min/compare: Side-by-side model vs market for every BTC/ETH × 5m/15m combo
summaries./strategies/crypto/5min/markets: Live model-vs-market table for every open 5m/15m crypto market
summaries./strategies/crypto/5min/predict/{symbol}: Pure-model P(up by end of next 5m/15m window) for one Binance pair
summaries./strategies/crypto/events: Live whale + mean-reversion events from the WS engine (last N min)
summaries./strategies/crypto/model-state/{symbol}: Live cryptostuff signals + annualized σ for the GBM model-prob calc
summaries./strategies/crypto/signals: Catalogue of the 9 microstructure signals computed by the WS engine
summaries./strategies/crypto/spec: How to launch the WS engine locally + what to expect
summaries./strategies/discovery: Filter the strategies catalog by tag.
summaries./strategies/risk-budget: Risk-parity capital allocation across deployable strategies.
summaries./strategies/{pair_id}/audit-trail: Historical signal + PnL log for a strategy pair_id.
summaries./terminal/backtest-compare: Compare N pairs-trading strategies side-by-side on the same data.
summaries./terminal/factor-clusters: Hierarchical clustering of factors by Δlogit-return correlation.
summaries./terminal/flow/{slug}: Trade-flow analytics (informed/aggressive flow) for a Polymarket market.
summaries./terminal/gdelt/breaking: Top global breaking-news headlines from GDELT (last 6 hours).
summaries./terminal/gdelt/{slug}: GDELT 2.0 global news for a Polymarket market's topic.
summaries./terminal/jumps/cluster: Group jumps across many slugs into macro-event clusters.
summaries./terminal/jumps/compare: Aligned per-slug jump timelines + shared-news days for ≤8 slugs.
summaries./terminal/jumps/{slug}: Detect price-series jumps and attach matching GDELT articles.
summaries./terminal/jumps/{slug}/backtest: Paper-PnL backtest of the disagrees-jump reversion signal.
summaries./terminal/news-impact/{slug}: GDELT news events with Polymarket price-reaction windows.
summaries./terminal/news/trending: Cross-source trending headlines ranked by recency, corroboration, and sentiment.
summaries./terminal/news/{slug}: Recent Reddit + HN posts mentioning a Polymarket market's topic.
summaries./terminal/rss-news: Discoverability alias for /headlines with optional ``q`` keyword.
summaries./terminal/rss/headlines: Unified, ranked RSS headlines across every active wire source.
summaries./terminal/rss/sources: List all RSS sources and their current ok/error status.
summaries./terminal/rss/{slug}: Headlines matching a Polymarket market's question keywords.
summaries./terminal/sentiment-leaderboard: Rank top-volume markets by news-sentiment / price-jump disagreement density.
summaries./terminal/sentiment-trend/spike-alerts: Markets where mean tone has shifted by more than 3.0 in the last N days.
summaries./terminal/sentiment-trend/{slug}: GDELT tone series for a market, with lag-correlation against price.
summaries./terminal/trades/{slug}: Recent classified trades for a Polymarket market.
summaries./terminal/whales/recent-large-trades: Recent large trades over the last N hours for one market.
summaries./terminal/whales/{slug}: Large positions per address for a Polymarket market.
summaries./whales/mirror: Build a mirror portfolio over a whale's current positions.
summaries./whales/{address}/history: Cumulative-PnL trace for a single whale over N days.
